verses.king_james: Praise ye the Lord. Praise the Lord, O my soul.

verses.latin_vulgate: Lauda, anima mea, Dominum.  Laudabo Dominum in vita mea ;  psallam Deo meo quamdiu fuero.  Nolite confidere in principibus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲהַלְלָ֣ה יְהֹוָ֣ה בְּחַיָּ֑י אֲזַמְּרָ֖ה לֵאלֹהַ֣י בְּעוֹדִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Praise the Lord, O my soul, in my life I will praise the Lord: I will sing to my God as long as I shall be. Put not your trust in princes:
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä kiitän Herraa niinkauvan kuin minä elän, ja Jumalalleni kiitoksen veisaan, niinkauvan kuin minä täällä olen.
verses.king_james: While I live will I praise the Lord: I will sing praises unto my God while I have any being.

verses.latin_vulgate: in filiis hominum, in quibus non est salus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַל־תִּבְטְח֥וּ בִנְדִיבִ֑ים בְּבֶן־אָדָ֓ם ׀ שֶׁ֤אֵ֖ין ל֥וֹ תְשׁוּעָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the children of men, in whom there is no salvation.
verses.finnish_biblia: Älkäät uskaltako päämiehiin; ihmiset he ovat, ei he voi mitään auttaa.
verses.king_james: Put not your trust in princes, nor in the son of man, in whom there is no help.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exibit spiritus ejus, et revertetur in terram suam ;  in illa die peribunt omnes cogitationes eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תֵּצֵ֣א ר֭וּחוֹ יָשֻׁ֣ב לְאַדְמָת֑וֹ בַּיּ֥וֹם הַ֝ה֗וּא אָבְד֥וּ עֶשְׁתֹּנֹתָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: His spirit shall go forth, and he shall return into his earth: in that day all their thoughts shall perish.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä ihmisen henki pitää erkaneman, ja hänen täytyy maaksi tulla jälleen: silloin ovat kaikki hänen aivoituksensa hukassa.
verses.king_james: His breath goeth forth, he returneth to his earth; in that very day his thoughts perish.

verses.latin_vulgate: Beatus cujus Deus Jacob adjutor ejus,  spes ejus in Domino Deo ipsius :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַשְׁרֵ֗י שֶׁ֤אֵ֣ל יַעֲקֹ֣ב בְּעֶזְר֑וֹ שִׂ֝בְר֗וֹ עַל־יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: Blessed is he who hath the God of Jacob for his helper, whose hope is in the Lord his God:
verses.finnish_biblia: Autuas on se, jonka apu Jakobin Jumala on, jonka toivo Herrassa hänen Jumalassansa on;
verses.king_james: Happy is he that hath the God of Jacob for his help, whose hope is in the Lord his God:

verses.latin_vulgate: qui fecit cælum et terram,  mare, et omnia quæ in eis sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֹשֶׂ֤ה ׀ שָׁ֘מַ֤יִם וָאָ֗רֶץ אֶת־הַיָּ֥ם וְאֶת־כׇּל־אֲשֶׁר־בָּ֑ם הַשֹּׁמֵ֖ר אֱמֶ֣ת לְעוֹלָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who made heaven and earth, the sea, and all things that are in them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka taivaan ja maan, meren ja kaikki, jotka niissä ovat, tehnyt on, joka totuuden pitää ijankaikkisesti;
verses.king_james: Which made heaven, and earth, the sea, and all that therein is: which keepeth truth for ever:

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui custodit veritatem in sæculum ;  facit judicium injuriam patientibus ;  dat escam esurientibus.  Dominus solvit compeditos ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֹשֶׂ֤ה מִשְׁפָּ֨ט ׀ לָעֲשׁוּקִ֗ים נֹתֵ֣ן לֶ֭חֶם לָרְעֵבִ֑ים יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה מַתִּ֥יר אֲסוּרִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who keepeth truth for ever: who executeth judgment for them that suffer wrong: who giveth food to the hungry. The Lord looseth them that are fettered:
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka oikeuden saattaa niille, jotka väkivaltaa kärsivät, joka isoovaiset ravitsee. Herra kirvottaa vangitut:
verses.king_james: Which executeth judgment for the oppressed: which giveth food to the hungry. The Lord looseth the prisoners:

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus illuminat cæcos.  Dominus erigit elisos ;  Dominus diligit justos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָ֤ה ׀ פֹּ֘קֵ֤חַ עִוְרִ֗ים יְ֭הֹוָה זֹקֵ֣ף כְּפוּפִ֑ים יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה אֹהֵ֥ב צַדִּיקִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord enlighteneth the blind. The Lord lifteth up them that are cast down: the Lord loveth the just.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra avaa sokian silmät: Herra nostaa kukistetut: Herra rakastaa vanhurskaita.
verses.king_james: The Lord openeth the eyes of the blind: the Lord raiseth them that are bowed down: the Lord loveth the righteous:

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus custodit advenas,  pupillum et viduam suscipiet,  et vias peccatorum disperdet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָ֤ה ׀ שֹׁ֘מֵ֤ר אֶת־גֵּרִ֗ים יָת֣וֹם וְאַלְמָנָ֣ה יְעוֹדֵ֑ד וְדֶ֖רֶךְ רְשָׁעִ֣ים יְעַוֵּֽת׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord keepeth the strangers, he will support the fatherless and the widow: and the ways of sinners he will destroy.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra varjelee vieraat, ja holhoo orpoja ja leskiä, ja jumalattomain tien hajoittaa.
verses.king_james: The Lord preserveth the strangers; he relieveth the fatherless and widow: but the way of the wicked he turneth upside down.

verses.latin_vulgate: Regnabit Dominus in sæcula ;  Deus tuus, Sion, in generationem et generationem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִמְלֹ֤ךְ יְהֹוָ֨ה ׀ לְעוֹלָ֗ם אֱלֹהַ֣יִךְ צִ֭יּוֹן לְדֹ֥ר וָדֹ֗ר הַֽלְלוּ־יָֽהּ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord shall reign for ever: thy God, O Sion, unto generation and generation.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra on kuningas ijankaikkisesti, sinun Jumalas, Zion, suvusta sukuun, Halleluja!
verses.king_james: The Lord shall reign for ever, even thy God, O Zion, unto all generations. Praise ye the Lord.
